name: prisma-query-builder-embedded-demo
description: Demo of Prisma Query Builder in embedded mode - Prisma 7.3.0

scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:push && npm run prisma:generate && npm run seed
scripts.build:lib: cd .. && npm install --force && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm run build:lib && npm install --force && npm run db:setup
scripts.start: npm run setup && npm run dev
